HTML templates for authentication, blog management, and a base layout in a Flask application.

## Folders
- **[auth](auth/README.md)**: HTML templates for login and user registration pages.
- **[blog](blog/README.md)**: HTML templates for creating, displaying, and updating blog posts in a Flask application.

## Files
- **[base.html](base.html.md)**: HTML template for a Flask application with navigation and user authentication links.
